answers.project_description: A modern retail management platform for inventory, credit sales, and multi-tenant store operations.
answers.problem_statement: Retailers lack integrated tools to manage both high-speed POS sales and complex, long-term customer installment debts.
answers.target_users: Retail Store Owners & Clerks: Owners managing inventory and debt, and clerks handling high-speed daily sales.
key_goals: High-Performance POS: Achieving sub-second item search and add-to-cart functionality.
Debt Integrity: Maintaining 100% accurate, immutable audit logs for customer installment payments.
Premium Experience: Delivering a 'wow factor' UI with dark mode, glassmorphism, and smooth animations.
answers.voice_tone: Friendly and Approachable: Easy to use, helpful, and minimizing retail stress.

workflow.tdd_strictness: Flexible - tests recommended only for significant backend features
workflow.verification_checkpoints: Milestone-based: Verification required after completing an entire Phase

styleguides.fsd_modularity: Strict Layering: No cross-imports between features or entities
